name: stratagraph-skills
description: Project-agnostic skills for finding and feeding knowledge in Stratagraph

plugins.name: stratagraph
plugins.description: Skills for using a Stratagraph knowledge project over MCP: find (verified lookup), import (interactive cold-start), and gather (daily cloud routine). Requires your Stratagraph project's MCP server connected, e.g. https://stratagraph.io/api/mcp/YOURPROJECT
